title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent available in Claude Pro and Max plans that runs on desktop computers and automates complex workflows by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. The tutorial demonstrates real-world use cases including organizing files, scheduling tasks, and integrating with Gmail and Google Calendar through connectors.
